Star Wars Ep. VIII: The Last Jedi (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $620,181,382Details
International Box Office $702,399,689
Worldwide Box Office $1,322,581,071
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $24,906,712
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $77,734,469
Total $102,641,181
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Skywalker saga continues as the heroes of The Force Awakens join the galactic legends in an epic adventure that unlocks age-old mysteries of the Force and shocking revelations of the past.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$220,009,584 (35.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$262,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,232 opening theaters/4,232 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $824,798,772

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 15th, 2017 (Wide) by Walt Disney
December 15th, 2017 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: December 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Brazil)
December 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Belgium)
December 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Taiwan)
December 13th, 2017 (Wide), released as Star Wars: Son Jedi (Turkey)
December 13th, 2017 (Wide), released as Star Wars: Poslední Jediovia (Slovakia)
Video Release: March 13th, 2018 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi action and violence.
(Rating bulletin 2503 (Cert #51222), 11/22/2017)
Running Time: 150 minutes
Franchise: Star Wars
Cast, crew, or production detail: Family Affair, Intertitle, Motion Capture Performance, Posthumous Release
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (country): Bolivia, England, Ireland, United Kingdom
Filming location (locale): Ceann Sibeal, Ireland, Malin Head, Ireland, Salar de Uyuni salt flats, Bolivia, Skellig Michael, Ireland
Filming location (production facility): Longcross Studios, Surrey, England, Pinewood Studios, Buckinghamshire, England
Filming location (state or county): Buckinghamshire England, County Donegal, Ireland, County Kerry, Ireland, Surrey, England
Geographical setting: Outer Space
Plot point: Death of a Sibling, Dysfunctional Family, Fugitive / On the Run, Gambling, Good vs. Evil, Prison Break, Robot, Twins
Social setting: Space Opera
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lucasfilm, Walt Disney Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
